'''sachovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyloe|kyloe]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ch-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyloe|kyloe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sachovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæcheveth|sæcheveth]] || [[word:sæchevej|sæchevej]] || [[word:sæchevesh|sæchevesh]] || [[word:sæcheve|sæcheve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sachochovoth|sachochovoth]] || [[word:sachochovoj|sachochovoj]] || [[word:sachochovosh|sachochovosh]] || [[word:sachochovo|sachochovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sachovoth|sachovoth]] || [[word:sachovoj|sachovoj]] || [[word:sachovosh|sachovosh]] || [[word:sachovo|sachovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sachofvoth|sachofvoth]] || [[word:sachofvoj|sachofvoj]] || [[word:sachofvosh|sachofvosh]] || [[word:sachofvof|sachofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sachovotho|sachovotho]] || [[word:sachovojo|sachovojo]] || [[word:sachovosho|sachovosho]] || [[word:sachovoko|sachovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sachovoth|sachovoth]] || [[word:sachovoj|sachovoj]] || [[word:sachovosh|sachovosh]] || [[word:sachovo|sachovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sachovothol|sachovothol]] || [[word:sachovojol|sachovojol]] || [[word:sachovoshol|sachovoshol]] || [[word:sachovokol|sachovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sachovothotho|sachovothotho]] || [[word:sachovojojo|sachovojojo]] || [[word:sachovoshosho|sachovoshosho]] || [[word:sachovoko|sachovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sachovothon|sachovothon]] || [[word:sachovojon|sachovojon]] || [[word:sachovoshon|sachovoshon]] || [[word:sachovokon|sachovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sachovothoro|sachovothoro]] || [[word:sachovojoro|sachovojoro]] || [[word:sachovoshoro|sachovoshoro]] || [[word:sachovokoro|sachovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
